allow: PowerShell(Get-Service -Name TermService, SessionEnv, UmRdpService, sshd, ssh-agent -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 22, 3389 } | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell($ts = Get-Command tailscale -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($ts\) { & $ts.Source status } else { 'tailscale CLI not found on PATH' })
